cover.subtitle:
신문왕의 9주 5소경,
전제왕권의 정점.
cover.imagePrompt: Unified Silla golden-age illustration, 7th century. ONE Silla king figure (King Sinmun) in gold-embroidered red royal robe and tall crown, seated on a low throne raising a small bamboo flute (manpasikjeok) toward a coastal sunrise. Background: temple silhouette and East Sea waves. Composition: serene authority, dawn light. Color: deep red + gold + ocean blue + clay-brown. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 정전 지급, 농민 생활 안정 도모.

outro.tip_headline:
"신문왕 폐지 → 경덕왕 부활"
녹읍의 운명을 기억.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 토지 제도(녹읍 폐지/정전 지급/녹읍 부활)를 왕과 짝지어 묻는다. '신문왕 녹읍 폐지·관료전 → 성덕왕 정전 → 경덕왕 녹읍 부활' 순서를 외울 것. 신문왕의 5대 정비(국학·9주5소경·9서당10정·관료전·녹읍 폐지)는 단골.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized bamboo flute (manpasikjeok) icon shown from a slight angle. RIGHT: a small Emille bell silhouette with dragon-shaped hanger. Cream #F2EDE3 base + deep red #B23A3A accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
